Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurs in the entire event log
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities

Name: Percentage of variants that include SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision being directly preceded by SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are followed by SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are followed by SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are followed by SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are followed by SW-EIC Minor Revision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-EIC Minor Revision'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision appearing in variants that eventually lead to manuscript acceptance (e.g., followed by SW-EIC Accept or RW-EIC Accept)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences relative to the total number of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation executions
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Number of distinct cases (manuscripts) that reach the SW-Awaiting EIC Decision stage
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are not followed by any further editorial decision within the log (i.e., potentially stalled cases)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurring after at least one instance of SW-Reviewer Agreed in the same case
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of variants containing SW-Reviewer Agreed that subsequently include SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurrences across the entire log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision events that occur more than 30 days after the original manuscript submission
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision being the penultimate activity before a final EIC decision (Accept, Reject, Major/Minor Revision)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Accept' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that follow a revision cycle (i.e., after Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' out of all 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting EIC Decision appears in variants with performance duration above the median variant duration
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' activities

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision occurrences that are part of multi-round review processes (i.e., cases with more than one SW-Awaiting EIC Decision)
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'
